text: "He that made the sun to stand"... That is, Joazim, the meaning of whose name in Hebrew is, he that made the sun to stand. In like manner the following names, Lying (Chozeba), Secure (Joas), and Burning (Saraph), are substituted in place of the Hebrew names of the same signification,
"Plantations and Hedges"... , These are the proper names of the places where they dwelt. In Hebrew Atharim and Gadira.
